task_objective: fix: Use backend-agnostic conversion for histogram results
design_decisions: Switched from plan.execute() to plan.to_pyarrow().to_pydict() for histogram results to ensure backend agnosticism.
Removed reliance on .columns attribute which is pandas-specific.
Updated histogram processing loop to handle dictionary output from Ibis/PyArrow.
Refined existing test mocks in tests/test_profiler.py to account for the switch from execute() to to_pyarrow().
results: Histogram processing is now backend-agnostic and more robust against different Ibis backend return types.
